goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 13:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'departure time', 'train ID', and 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 13:00 and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on thursday and should depart from london liverpool street
Make sure you get departure time, train ID, and price
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get entrance fee
